title: bourreria schatziana
intro: Bourreria schatziana, also known as the Madagascar bourreria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to Madagascar, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, which are rich in flavonoids and alkaloids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Bourreria schatziana include infusions and extracts, which can be used to harness its health benefits, including antioxidant and antiseptic properties.
